title: volta bootstrap vars
description: volta bootstrap variables. OS Compatibility: All. Hassle-Free JavaScript Tool Manager.

VOLTA_HOME.description: Custom installation directory for Volta. Defaults to ~/.volta.

VOLTA_FEATURE_PNPM.description: Set to 1 to enable Volta's experimental pnpm support.

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
